title: G4GADGET Strong Quality Set of Gold Plastic Winner Medals Necklaces Sports Day Awards Star Classroom kids awards
features: Size: ribbon length is 30 cm/ 11.8 inch, winner medals diameter is 3.5 cm/ 1.4 inch; Material: ribbon and plastic; Winner medal color: golden
Appearance: each plastic gold medal has two side; One side written winner with 5 small stars and 1 big star on the other side and ribbon color is red, white and blue
Suitable for: the plastic medals can be applied as good encouragement and praise, which is suitable for themed parties, festivals, competition, sports day and so on
White connector: there is a white connector divided into 2 parts at the end of the ribbon; Just push one part into the other when applying; If you want to remove it, just draw back the 2 parts

Package: includes 12 packs plastic medals; These golden awards are lightweight, easy to carry and convenient to apply; They are enough for you as winner praises to hold all kinds of small competitions
